CVE-2020-14928.title: evolution-data-server (eds) through 3.36.3 has a STARTTLS bufferi ...
CVE-2020-14928.summary: evolution-data-server (eds) through 3.36.3 has a STARTTLS buffering issue that affects SMTP and POP3. When a server sends a "begin TLS" response, eds reads additional data and evaluates it in a TLS context, aka "response injection."

CVE-2020-16117.title: In GNOME evolution-data-server before 3.35.91, a malicious server ...
CVE-2020-16117.summary: In GNOME evolution-data-server before 3.35.91, a malicious server can crash the mail client with a NULL pointer dereference by sending an invalid (e.g., minimal) CAPABILITY line on a connection attempt. This is related to imapx_free_capability and imapx_connect_to_server.
